data.title: SonarX Partners With Amazon To Integrate On-Chain Datasets Into AWS
data.description: SonarX announced on Wednesday that it has partnered with Amazon's AWS, along with the teams at Base, Arbitrum, Provenance Blockchain, Aptos, and Ripple, to bring its indexed on-chain datasets to AWS's Open Data program.

data.title: Synopsys Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Soft Guidance, Expanding Opportunities Powered By 'AI-Driven Reinvention Of Compute'
data.description: Synopsys reports fourth-quarter financial results after the market close on Wednesday. Here's a rundown of the report.

data.title: French Government Collapses After Vote Of No Confidence
data.description: The French government collapsed on Wednesday following a successful no-confidence vote, throwing France, the eurozone's second-largest economy, into political turmoil.

data.title: MicroStrategy, UnitedHealth Group, SoundHound, SentinelOne, Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description:
U.S. stocks saw a positive day with the Dow Jones climbing approximately 300 points. The NASDAQ rose by 1.3%, closing at 19,735.12, while the S&P 500 increased by 0.6% to 6,086.49.

data.title: Mohamed El-Erian Calls Michel Barnier's Ouster An Example Of 'Messy Politics,' Notes Greek And French Bonds Achieving Historic Parity
data.description: Mohamed El-Erian, Allianz's Chief Economic Advisor, warned Wednesday Dec. 4, 2024 about the growing intersection of political and economic challenges in France following Prime Minister Michel Barnier's historic no-confidence ouster, even as Greek bonds achieved parity with French sovereign debt for the first time since the Eurozone crisis.
